plays.summary: Grayson Rodriguez (LAA, xFIP 3.92) is solid — the dominant pitching factor suppressing CLE's run-scoring potential. Both lineups grade below average in run production, and the park (PF 97) provides an under tilt. No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 8.0 runs — watch for a under opportunity when odds open.

Didier Fuentes (ATL, xFIP 4.76) is below-average on the mound, creating a clear vulnerability for NYY's offense to exploit. NYY's lineup (wRC+ 108) adds offensive upside, and the park (PF 102) tilts hitter-friendly. No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 10.0 runs — watch for a over opportunity when odds open.

Starters are similarly matched (Chase Burns 3.95 / Landen Roupp 4.21 xFIP), and both lineups grade below average in run production. No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 8.1 runs — watch for a under opportunity when odds open.
